name: carl-core
description: Context Augmentation & Reinforcement Layer - Dynamic rules for Claude Code

scripts.build:opencode: npx tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/plugin.js'; if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('ERROR: '+p+' not found');process.exit(1)} console.log('[build] OpenCode plugin built successfully'); console.log('[build] Output: '+require('path').resolve(p))"

author: Chris Kahler
